  nix-lint:
    name: Nix Lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
        with:
          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable

      - name: Check formatting
        run: nix run nixpkgs#nixfmt -- --check .

  zizmor:
    name: Zizmor
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
        with:
          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable

      - name: Run zizmor
        run: |
          rc=0
          nix run nixpkgs#zizmor -- . --no-online-audits || rc=$?
          # Exit 13 = warnings only (acceptable), exit 14+ = errors
          if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && [ "$rc" -ne 13 ]; then exit "$rc"; fi

  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Build production bundle
        run: nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run build"

  build-android:
    name: Build Android (debug)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@49933ea5288caeca8642d1e84afbd3f7d6820020 # v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Setup JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@c1e323688fd81a25caa38c78aa6df2d33d3e20d9 # v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: '17'

      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@9fc6c4e9069bf8d3d10b2204b1fb8f6ef7065407 # v3

      - name: Install deps and sync Capacitor
        run: |
          npm ci
          npm run build
          npx cap sync android

      - name: Build debug APK
        run: |
          cd android
          ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon

      - name: Upload debug APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4
        with:
          name: flux-debug-apk
          path: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
          retention-days: 7

  catalog-validation:
    name: Catalog Validation
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Validate exercise catalog
        run: nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run validate-catalog"

  e2e:
    name: E2E Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Run Playwright tests
        run: nix develop .#test --command npx playwright test --project=chromium

      - name: Upload test artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4
        if: failure()
        with:
          name: playwright-report
          path: |
            playwright-report/
            test-results/
          retention-days: 7

## Summary

First of three PRs landing the user-equipment-inventory feature. This PR is **app-level only** — no behavior change for end users yet.

- **`src/data/equipmentCatalog.ts`** — normalized `EQUIPMENT_CATALOG` with 11 kinds (kettlebell, dumbbell, barbell, bench, pullup-bar, swedish-ladder, trx, resistance-band, peloton-bike, cardio-equipment, bodyweight). Each item carries `category` and `hasWeightSelection` so future UI can branch off it.
- **`src/data/types.ts`** — `Exercise.equipment?: string[]` (with the TODO) is replaced by `equipmentRequired: EquipmentKind[]` and optional `equipmentAlternatives: EquipmentKind[][]`. AND-semantics inside a group, OR-semantics across alternatives.
- **`src/data/exerciseCatalog.ts`** — all 16 entries backfilled. Alternatives populated where the existing technique notes already suggest a viable substitute (e.g. KB gorilla rows → DB fallback, peloton classes → generic cardio equipment).
- **`scripts/validate-catalog.ts`** — adds a cross-reference check: every kind in `equipmentRequired` and inside each `equipmentAlternatives` group must exist in `EQUIPMENT_CATALOG`. The check is now exposed as `validateExerciseCatalog(...)` so it can be unit-tested without shelling out.
- **`src/db/programSchema.ts`** — `validateProgramSchema` / `validateProgram` accept an optional `InventoryView`. When supplied, every catalog-resolved exercise whose `equipmentRequired` isn't fully owned (and whose alternatives aren't fully owned either) emits a warning. `bodyweight` is always covered. Warnings live on a new `warnings?: Finding[]` channel — `ok` and `errors` are unchanged for backward compatibility.

Follow-ups:
- **PR-B**: user inventory store in IndexedDB + Settings UI + constrained weight picker on the exercise card.
- **PR-C**: planner integration (LLM consumer of the inventory + alternatives).

## Test plan

- [x] `nix develop --command npm run typecheck` passes
- [x] `nix develop --command npm run validate-catalog` passes
- [x] `nix develop --command npm run build` passes
- [x] `nix develop .#test --command npx playwright test --project=chromium` — 24 tests pass, including 9 new programSchema cases (backward-compat, empty-inventory warnings, full-inventory zero-warnings, alternative-honored, warnings-don't-flip-ok, bodyweight-always-covered, catalog cross-reference for both `equipmentRequired` and `equipmentAlternatives`)
- [x] `klaus _pre-review` reports no findings
- [x] No breaking change to the existing import flow — fixture-based tests still pass without supplying an inventory
